top3.sql:
SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date)
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
  )
  AND a.account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM (
      SELECT account_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
      FROM trans
      WHERE type = 'salary' AND operation = 'credit'
      GROUP BY account_id
    )
    WHERE avg_salary = (
      SELECT MIN(avg_salary)
 ...

SELECT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, (
    SELECT AVG(t.amount)
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id
) ASC
LIMIT 1;
